---
title: "Ranger"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-06-04"
output: html_document
---


# Ranger escenari nul
```{r}
setwd("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos")

load("dades_escenari_nul_corrAleat.RData")

library(ranger)
library(futurize)
library(progressify)

# Paral·lelització
plan(multisession, workers = 12)

# Funció per a una simulació
una_iteracio_nul <- function(j, X_esc, Y_esc) {

  library(ranger)

  X_df <- as.data.frame(X_esc[[j]])
  colnames(X_df) <- paste0("V", seq_len(ncol(X_df)))

  y_fac <- as.factor(Y_esc[[j]])

  tryCatch({

    dades_rf <- cbind(X_df, y = y_fac)

    model_rf <- ranger(
      y ~ .,
      data = dades_rf,
      num.trees = 500,
      mtry = floor(sqrt(ncol(X_df))),
      importance = "permutation",
      num.threads = 1,
      seed = 123
    )

    imp <- importance(model_rf)

   sel <- names(imp[imp > 0.001])

    if (length(sel) == 0) {
      return(0)
    } else {
      return(length(sel))
    }

  }, error = function(e) {

    cat(sprintf(
      "  [WARN ranger] sim %d: %s\n",
      j,
      conditionMessage(e)
    ))

    return(0)
  })
}

# Data frame de resultats
resultats_fp_ranger <- data.frame(
  N = integer(),
  pi = numeric(),
  correlation = character(),
  FP = numeric(),
  FP_percent = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

temps_total <- system.time({

  resultats_llista <- vector("list", nrow(comb))

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(comb))) {

    N <- comb$N[i]
    pi <- comb$pi[i]
    correlation <- as.character(comb$correlation[i])

    cat(sprintf(
      "\n====================================\n"
    ))
    cat(sprintf(
      "Escenari %d/%d (N=%s, pi=%s, cor=%s)\n",
      i, nrow(comb), N, pi, correlation
    ))
    cat(sprintf(
      "====================================\n"
    ))

    temps_esc <- system.time({

      fp_iter <- lapply(
        1:iters,
        una_iteracio_nul,
        X_esc = X[[i]],
        Y_esc = Y[[i]]
      ) |>
        progressify() |>
        futurize(seed = 123)

      fp_vec <- unlist(fp_iter)

    })

    resultats_llista[[i]] <- data.frame(
      N = N,
      pi = pi,
      correlation = correlation,
      FP = mean(fp_vec),
      FP_percent = mean(fp_vec) / num_vars,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    cat(sprintf(
      "Escenari %d completat en %.2f segons\n",
      i,
      temps_esc["elapsed"]
    ))

    cat(sprintf(
      "FP mitjà = %.3f | FP%% = %.3f\n",
      mean(fp_vec),
      mean(fp_vec) / num_vars
    ))
  }

  resultats_fp_ranger <- do.call(
    rbind,
    resultats_llista
  )
})

cat("\n====================================\n")
cat(sprintf(
  "Temps total: %.2f minuts\n",
  temps_total["elapsed"] / 60
))
cat("====================================\n\n")

print(resultats_fp_ranger)

save(
  resultats_fp_ranger,
  file = "resultats_fp_ranger_nul.RData"
)
```
